title: Why Homeowners Trust Empire Home Solutions
description: Heating and Gas Engineers for boiler installation, boiler repair, and domestic power flushing.
companyStory: Empire Home Solutions started as a local Heating and Gas engineering team serving West London households with rapid, reliable boiler care. Today we continue to focus on clear communication, safe installations, domestic power flushing, and dependable aftercare.
engineerCredentials: Gas Safe Registered engineers on every job
guaranteePolicy: Boiler installations are guaranteed for up to 10 years depending on selected range, with 5 or 7 year options on selected budget models.
reviewProof: Hundreds of completed repair and installation jobs
24/7 emergency call out coverage for urgent faults

contactInfo.area: West London, Greater London, Buckinghamshire, Hertfordshire, Berkshire, Surrey

insuranceStatement: Public liability insurance and employer liability insurance are active and available on request.

seo.title: About & Trust | Empire Home Solutions
seo.description: Learn about our Gas Safe credentials, 24/7 emergency call outs, and up to 10-year installation guarantees.
